sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67787" key="mikrofilo/timos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μικρο-φῐλότῑμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n67787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seeking petty distinctions</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0093.tlg009:23:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
